metadata.title: Certificates and Quality | Welltech®
metadata.description: Welltech stainless steel production standards, quality certificates, ISO 9001, PED 2014/68/EU and non-destructive testing (NDT) procedures.

hero.title: Certificates and Quality
hero.desc: Zero defect principle and full traceability. Every equipment we produce is guaranteed with internationally recognized certifications (PED, ASME, ISO).

globalStandards.title: Global Quality Standards
globalStandards.desc: Every stainless steel plate entering the Welltech® production line is recorded with an EN 10204 3.1 material certificate, ensuring full traceability until project delivery. Our welding processes are carried out by approved (Certified) welders, strictly adhering to international WPS (Welding Procedure Specification) and PQR (Procedure Qualification Record) standards.

certifications.title: Corporate Certifications
certifications.note: * Our facility is periodically audited by international independent audit organizations (TÜV, SGS, Bureau Veritas etc.).

items.q: What documents do you provide upon delivery?
items.a: We provide a 'Quality File' (Data Book) upon project delivery. This file includes EN 10204 3.1 material certificates, welder certificates, NDT test reports, hydrostatic test minutes, and general technical drawings.

items.q: Are you open to Third Party inspections?
items.a: Absolutely. Upon our customers' requests, we allow independent organizations such as TÜV SÜD, SGS, Bureau Veritas, or Lloyd's Register to accompany the production and testing processes in our factory.

iso.title: ISO 9001:2015
iso.subtitle: Quality Certificate
iso.desc: You can download the current ISO 9001:2015 certificate of our quality management system in PDF format.

department.title: Quality Department
department.desc: Contact our department for custom certification requests or quality control (QC) procedures related to your project.

metadata.title: About Us | Welltech®
metadata.description: World-class stainless steel process and storage technologies from Izmir to the world.

jsonLd.description: From Izmir to 6 continents; we produce stainless steel process and storage technologies at international standards (ASME, PED) for the food, chemical, and pharmaceutical industries.

hero.desc: From Izmir to the world; we produce stainless steel process and storage technologies at international standards (ASME, PED) for the food, chemical, and pharmaceutical industries.

roots.title: Our Roots
roots.p1: At our production facility located in Kemalpaşa Organized Industrial Zone in Izmir, one of Turkey's industrial capitals, we design industrial process and storage solutions by combining our engineering power with international standards.
roots.p2: As Welltech® International Engineering, we are not just a machine or tank manufacturer. We are a reliable solution partner standing by you from the beginning of your projects to their commissioning. From integrated facility installations to very specific equipment needs, we center "European Quality" and "Occupational Safety" at every stage.

global.title: From Izmir to 6 Continents...
global.desc: From our production base in Turkey, we pump engineering solutions at international (ASME & PED) standards to more than 30 countries across 6 continents. Every delivery is a masterpiece of global trust.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: To produce long-lasting, energy-saving, and hygienic process technologies that increase the operational efficiency of our customers; serving the industry with a zero-defect principle on the production line.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: To be the most trusted Turkish stainless steel technology and process brand across 6 continents in the food, chemical, petrochemical, and pharmaceutical industries, and the first name that comes to mind when engineering is mentioned.

quality.title: Our Quality Approach
quality.desc: All our processes are subject to international certifications. Every technical detail, from weld penetrations to surface roughness (Ra) tests, is verified and delivered by our expert engineers.

cta.title: Let's Build Your Projects Together
cta.desc: Meet our experienced engineering team for the modernization of your factory, capacity increase, or turnkey facility installation.

metadata.title: Industrial Storage Tanks | Welltech® International
metadata.description: Stainless steel liquid storage and stock tanks with capacities up to 150 tons, designed to international standards.

hero.title: Industrial Storage Tanks
hero.desc: Capacity up to 150 tons for your massive storage needs. Long-lasting stainless steel solutions designed with ASME and EN engineering standards.

engineering.title: 150-Ton Engineering Power
engineering.desc: The Welltech® production line offers a wide capacity range from boutique-scale 1,000-liter tanks to massive 150-ton (150,000 Liter) on-site tanks for industrial facilities. As tonnage increases, hydrostatic load on the body, seismic risks, and wind load analyses are calculated with special engineering software to target zero risk.

capacityTable.title: Standard Capacity Table
capacityTable.note: * The above values are standard. Diameter/height ratios are resized by our engineers according to the height of your facility and ground survey.

items.q: How are 150-ton tanks brought to the facility?
items.a: Mega tanks of 50,000 Liters and above, which exceed highway transport limits, are built at your facility using the 'On-site fabrication' method by our expert welding teams.

items.q: Why is seismic load analysis important?
items.a: Especially in tanks of 20 tons and above, the sloshing effect created by the fluid in the event of an earthquake can overturn the tank. We calculate these forces in advance and design special anchorage and wall thickness.

spec.title: Technical Specification
spec.subtitle: DOC-01 PDF Document
spec.desc: Wall thickness calculations, welding certifications, and static load tolerances.

reference.desc: Installation of a 150,000-liter capacity, on-site fabricated stainless steel storage tank battery for a large-scale chemical facility.

cta.title: Capacity Planning
cta.desc: Share your space dimensions and fluid properties for your storage projects up to 150 tons, and let us design them.
cta.whatsappMsg: Hello, I would like to get information about industrial storage tank capacity and pricing.

metadata.title: Chemical and Acid Storage Tanks | Welltech®
metadata.description: Up to 150 tons capacity, aggressive corrosion resistant API 650 standard 316Ti and Hastelloy chemical tank solutions.

hero.title: Chemical and Acid Tanks
hero.desc: Zero tolerance engineering for maximum hazard class. Heavy-duty storage systems up to 150 tons, fully resistant to corrosion and pressure.

corrosion.title: Aggressive Corrosion Control
corrosion.desc: Sulfuric acid, nitric acid, caustic, or explosive solvents... Fluids in the chemical industry can melt ordinary steel in days, leading to disaster. Welltech® applies API 650 and EN 14015 standards in chemical storage projects. Depending on the aggressiveness of the chemical, we ensure the mechanical integrity of the tank using AISI 316L, AISI 316Ti (Titanium alloy), or Hastelloy. Our project design ranges from 1,000 liters to 150,000 liters (150 Tons) mega tanks.

capacityTable.title: Heavy-Duty Capacity and Wall Thickness
capacityTable.note: * Depending on the specific gravity (density) of the chemical, the sheet wall thickness increases dramatically. The values are minimum references calculated for aggressive fluids.
capacityTable.customRow: Custom API 650 Design for Mega Sites

items.q: What are NDT (Non-Destructive Testing) Welding Tests?
items.a: In hazardous chemical tanks, an invisible weld gap can cause an explosion. By applying RT (X-Ray) and PT (Liquid Penetrant) tests to weld seams during production, we prove that there are not even microscopic cracks.

items.q: Which stainless steel should I choose for which acid?
items.a: For oxidizing acids like Nitric acid, AISI 304L may be suitable. However, if Sulfuric acid or Phosphoric acid is to be stored, AISI 316L, 316Ti containing Molybdenum, or Hastelloy superalloy must be used depending on the situation.

spec.title: Technical Specification
spec.subtitle: DOC-04 PDF Document
spec.desc: Chemical specific gravity resistances calculated at API 650 standards, X-ray test details, and safety fittings.

reference.desc: "Highly corrosion-resistant, Hastelloy alloyed and fully automated sulfuric acid storage tank battery for a petrochemical plant."

cta.title: Safe Project Design
cta.desc: Share the name, concentration, and target volume (up to 150 tons) of the chemical you will store; let us design your zero-risk project.
cta.whatsappMsg: Hello, I would like to get capacity and price information about chemical and acid storage tanks.

metadata.title: Stainless Steel Milk Cooling and Storage Tanks | Welltech®
metadata.description: Stainless steel raw milk storage tanks with up to 150 tons capacity, ultra-hygienic, CIP system, and polyurethane insulation.

hero.title: Milk Storage Tanks
hero.desc: Ultra-hygienic design targeting zero bacterial growth for your dairy processes. Mega storage solutions up to 150 tons with high-capacity polyurethane insulation.

engineering.title: Ultra Hygiene and Cold Chain
engineering.desc: In dairy processes, the slightest welding flaw or surface roughness can turn into a bacterial breeding ground. Welltech® milk storage tanks feature smooth mirror-polished surfaces and fully ovalized (no dead spots) welded joints to preserve the fluid's structure. In our mega storage projects reaching up to 150 tons capacity, high-density polyurethane insulation and roll-bond cooling jackets are used for facilities that do not want to break the +4°C cold chain.

items.6: Low-Speed Agitator to Prevent Fat Separation

capacityTable.title: Standard Dairy Tank Capacities
capacityTable.note: * The values above are for reference. Tank batteries up to 150,000 Liters for mega facilities are custom designed by our expert team.
capacityTable.customRow: Mega Milk Silos - Outdoor / On-Site Installation

items.q: Why are agitators used in milk storage tanks?
items.a: The fat layer in raw milk resting for a long time rises to the surface and causes creaming. To preserve the homogeneity of the milk, very low-speed (approx. 20-30 rpm) paddle agitators that will not disrupt the milk's structure are placed inside the tank.

items.q: What exactly is the CIP (Clean-in-Place) System?
items.a: It is an automatic cleaning system performed using acid, caustic, and hot water through automatic valves, high-pressure pumps, and spray balls without human entry into the tank. It is indispensable for food safety in the dairy industry.

spec.title: Technical Specification
spec.subtitle: DOC-03 PDF Document
spec.desc: Surface polishing standards (Ra values) specific to the dairy industry, polyurethane insulation density, and CIP design.

reference.desc: "Project of 100,000 Liter capacity, polyurethane insulated outdoor milk storage silos for a national dairy brand."

cta.title: Let's Grow Your Facility
cta.desc: Let us design a hygienic tank battery in capacities up to 150 tons for your dairy or mega milk production facility.
cta.whatsappMsg: Hello, I would like to get technical information and pricing about milk storage and cooling tanks.

metadata.title: Nitrogen Blanketed Olive Oil Storage Tanks | Welltech®
metadata.description: Conical bottom stainless olive oil tanks up to 150 tons capacity, reducing oxidation to zero with inert gas technology.

hero.title: Olive Oil Storage Systems
hero.desc: Nitrogen blanketing technology to preserve your valuable harvest with its first-day exquisite taste for years. Custom-designed stainless solutions up to 150 tons capacity.

engineering.title: Engineering Marvel Storage
engineering.desc: The biggest enemies in olive oil storage are air (oxygen) and light. Welltech® tanks are equipped with special fittings suitable for evacuating the air inside and pumping Nitrogen gas instead. This technology reduces oxidation to zero. From small boutique facilities to 150-ton mega facilities, we manufacture conical or flat bottom tanks suitable for all your needs.

capacityTable.title: Standard Capacities and Dimensions
capacityTable.note: * Values in the table are for reference. Welltech engineering team provides custom sizing for your facility up to 150 tons.

items.q: Why is nitrogen used in olive oil storage?
items.a: The contact of olive oil with air (oxygen) triggers rancidity. Since nitrogen gas is heavier than air, when pumped into the tank, it creates a protective cushion over the oil.

items.q: Should I choose a conical bottom or a flat bottom?
items.a: To rest unfiltered (fresh) olive oil, fully conical bottom tanks collect the sediment at a single point and provide easy discharge. For filtered oils, large tonnage flat-bottomed tanks are suitable.

spec.title: Technical Specification
spec.subtitle: DOC-02 PDF Document
spec.desc: Document containing sizing, sheet thicknesses, conical bottom angles, and nitrogen fitting details.

reference.desc: Conical bottom, nitrogen blanketed, and fully automated stainless steel tank battery for a large-scale olive oil production facility.

cta.title: Have a Custom Project?
cta.desc: Get project design support from our engineers for nitrogen blanketed tank batteries up to 150 tons.
cta.whatsappMsg: Hello, I would like to get technical information and pricing about olive oil storage tanks.

metadata.title: Stainless Industrial Pumps | Welltech®
metadata.description: Centrifugal, Positive Displacement, Self-Priming, Drum, Air Diaphragm and Monopump industrial hygienic pump systems.

hero.title: Hygienic Transfer Solutions
hero.desc: Industrial pump systems that transfer all types of products from liquids to the highest viscosity, from chemicals to fluid foods, with the most suitable technology for your process.

categories.title: Centrifugal Pumps
categories.desc: Ideal solutions for fast, uninterrupted and hygienic (CIP) transfer of low-viscosity products such as milk, water, juice and olive oil at high flow rates.

categories.title: Positive Displacement Pumps
categories.desc: Precise lobe and rotor pumps that transfer high-viscosity products such as honey, chocolate, tomato paste and cosmetic creams without crushing or disrupting their structure.

categories.title: Self-Priming Pumps
categories.desc: Specially designed systems that can create vacuum and prime even when there is no liquid in the line, used for transferring air-mixed and foamy fluids.

categories.title: Drum Pumps
categories.desc: Portable solutions for safely and without loss emptying acids, chemicals and fluid foods from barrels, IBC tanks or containers.

categories.title: Air Diaphragm Pumps
categories.desc: Pumps operating with compressed air in flammable/combustible (ATEX) environments with risk of electric sparks, capable of transferring products containing solid particles.

categories.title: Monopumps
categories.desc: Eccentric screw (Rotor-Stator) pumps for pulsation-free, continuous transfer of extremely viscous and particulate products such as sludge, honey, dough and polymers.

cta.title: Correct Pump Selection
cta.desc: Let our engineers calculate the most suitable pump power for your process based on the viscosity of your fluid, target transfer time and pressure loss in the pipeline.

metadata.title: Positive Displacement & Lobe Pumps | Welltech®
metadata.description: Hygienic lobe pumps for transfer of high-viscosity products such as honey, chocolate, tomato paste and cosmetics without crushing.

hero.title: Positive Displacement Pumps
hero.desc: Hygienic lobe pump systems that transfer high-viscosity fluids such as honey, chocolate, tomato paste and cosmetics without crushing or damaging their cellular structure.

technology.title: Precise & Gentle Transfer
technology.desc: The high-speed impellers of centrifugal pumps damage dense products like honey or chocolate. Our positive displacement (lobe) pumps transport the fluid in large chambers through stainless steel lobes rotating at very low speeds without contact. The cellular integrity (particle, consistency) of the product is never compromised. Even the densest products up to 100,000 cP viscosity can be pumped at constant high pressure.

features.title: Technical Engineering Features
items: Gearbox & Inverter for Variable Flow Rates
Heating Jacket Front Cover Option for Chocolate

table.title: Lobe Pump Capacity Table
table.note: * As viscosity increases, the pump speed must be reduced. Gearbox selection is calculated by our engineers based on the specific product to be transferred (tomato paste, honey, glucose, etc.).

items.q: Are lobe pumps suitable for CIP (Clean-in-Place) cleaning?
items.a: Yes, as they are designed to meet food and pharmaceutical industry standards (EHEDG and 3A), they can be cleaned excellently with hot water and caustic through the pipeline.

items.q: How do you prevent freezing during chocolate transfer?
items.a: Chocolate and vegetable oils tend to solidify at room temperature. By adding a jacket option to the front cover of our lobe pumps and circulating hot water through it, we guarantee that the product remains liquid.

items.q: Why can't centrifugal pumps handle honey?
items.a: The impellers of centrifugal pumps rotate at high speed. When a high-viscosity fluid like honey hits the impeller, it creates great resistance that can burn the motor or damage the molecular structure (crystallization) of the product. Lobe pumps overcome this density with low RPM and high torque.

doc.title: Technical Document
doc.subtitle: DOK-11 PDF Specification
doc.desc: Lobe pump viscosity/speed diagrams, jacketed cover dimensions and gearbox power selection table.

reference.desc: Speed-controlled (inverter-driven), double-lobe, 316L hygienic displacement pump integration for a facility producing body lotions and creams.

cta.title: Torque & Power Calculation
cta.desc: Tell us the type and density (cP) of the product you will transfer, and we will select the most suitable gearbox-driven lobe pump.

metadata.title: Hygienic Centrifugal Pumps | Welltech®
metadata.description: High-flow, CIP-compatible, stainless steel hygienic centrifugal pumps for milk, water, juice and olive oil transfer.

hero.title: Hygienic Centrifugal Pumps
hero.desc: Maximum flow rate and hydrodynamic efficiency for low-viscosity fluids. Transfer systems fully compliant with CIP standards for milk, olive oil and beverage processes.

technology.title: High Flow, Continuous Transfer
technology.desc: Centrifugal pumps pressurize the fluid using the centrifugal force generated by the rotation of the motor-driven impeller. It is the most ideal, long-lasting and low-cost solution for transferring low-viscosity (1-500 cP) products such as milk, juice, wine, olive oil and liquid chemicals. Offered with optimized motor powers based on your facility's pipe diameter, desired flow rate and discharge head (mWC).

features.title: Equipment & Material Features
items: Full Compatibility with CIP and SIP Systems

table.title: Centrifugal Pump Capacity Table
table.note: * Values in the table are referenced to water (1 cP) viscosity. Our hydraulic engineers will select the correct motor based on the number of elbows and discharge head in your line.

items.q: What is the difference between open and closed impellers?
items.a: For fully liquid products like milk and water, a closed impeller is used to achieve maximum pressure (mWC). However, for fluids containing small particles such as pulpy juice or grape must, an open impeller is preferred to prevent clogging.

items.q: What does pump cavitation mean?
items.a: When there is insufficient liquid on the pump suction line or the pipe diameter is too narrow, the boiling point of the fluid drops and air bubbles form. These bubbles erode the metal when they hit the impeller blades. Our engineers eliminate this risk by selecting pumps with low NPSH values.

items.q: What should I do if the mechanical seal leaks?
items.a: In our food pumps, sealing is provided by high-tech Carbon/Silicon Carbide mechanical seals instead of braided rope packing. In case of wear, the seal kit is designed to be easily replaced at your facility within minutes.

doc.title: Technical Document
doc.subtitle: DOK-10 PDF Specification
doc.desc: Centrifugal pump performance curves, NPSH values and mechanical seal material compatibility table.

reference.desc: CIP-compatible centrifugal pump battery with stainless cover and 40 m³/h capacity for a facility processing 500 tons of raw milk per day.

cta.title: Pump Selection
cta.desc: Tell us the type of liquid, your flow demand and pipeline length, and we will calculate the most efficient motor and impeller diameter.

metadata.title: Industrial Drum & IBC Pumps | Welltech®
metadata.description: Portable pump solutions for safe discharge of acids, chemicals and liquid foods from drums, IBC tanks and containers.

hero.title: Drum & IBC Tank Pumps
hero.desc: End product losses from manual discharge of raw materials. Lightweight, portable and highly efficient discharge units specially designed for acids, chemicals and liquid foods.

technology.title: Safe Raw Material Discharge
technology.desc: In industrial production, raw materials are usually supplied in 200-liter drums or 1000-liter IBC tanks. Manual emptying of these containers causes both product loss and work accidents. Welltech drum pumps provide 99% discharge efficiency, leaving only a few drops of product at the bottom of the container thanks to the immersion-type tube design. They adapt to the most demanding field conditions with electric and pneumatic motor options.

features.title: Product & Motor Options
items: AISI 316L or PP / PVDF Tube Options
Screw Type for High-Viscosity Honey and Tomato Paste

table.title: Drum Pump Selection Table
table.note: * The immersion tube material must be selected according to the corrosion table of the chemical to be transferred. ATEX motors must be used for flammable liquids.

items.q: Which motor should I choose for solvent or alcohol transfer?
items.a: Standard electric motors can produce sparks when transferring flammable and combustible fluids. In this case, ATEX certified explosion-proof motors or pneumatic motors operating with compressed air must be used.

items.q: What is a screw-type (Eccentric Screw) drum pump used for?
items.a: Standard drum pumps cannot draw products with very low fluidity such as honey, glucose or dense cosmetic creams. Screw-type drum pumps can effortlessly vacuum and pump products of this density thanks to their endless screw mechanism.

items.q: How is the pump tube cleaned?
items.a: Welltech drum pumps have a modular design. The motor and tube parts are separated from each other within seconds. The shaft and impeller inside the tube can be easily removed and placed in a sterilization or CIP bath.

doc.title: Technical Document
doc.subtitle: DOK-12 PDF Specification
doc.desc: Chemical resistance table, motor speed ranges and IBC tank connection fittings technical document.

reference.desc: Automatic drum emptying station with ATEX certified, solvent-resistant PVDF tube for a paint factory.

cta.title: Motor Selection
cta.desc: Specify the raw material you will transfer and the number of drums, and we will determine the electric or pneumatic motor option together.

metadata.title: Heating & Cooling Jacketed Tanks | Welltech®
metadata.description: Stainless steel heating/cooling process tanks with roll-bond (dimple) and half-pipe serpentine jackets for high thermal efficiency.

hero.title: Heating & Cooling Jacketed Tanks
hero.desc: Maximum thermal efficiency for your processes requiring precise temperature control. Specially insulated systems equipped with roll-bond, half-pipe or full jacket technology.

technology.title: Thermodynamic Engineering
technology.desc: Keeping the fluid at the correct temperature in production processes directly determines the final product quality. Our systems are designed with special jackets through which steam, hot oil, hot water or glycol/ice water can circulate. We prefer Roll-Bond (Dimple) jackets for low-pressure cooling processes, while using welded Half-Pipe Serpentine technology for heating reactions requiring high pressure and steam.

table.title: Jacket Technology Selection Table
table.note: * Our engineers determine the most suitable jacket type based on the type and pressure of the heating/cooling fluid in your facility.

items.q: Why should I use Half-Pipe instead of Dimple Jacket for steam applications?
items.a: Steam and hot oil have very high pressure and temperature. Dimple (honeycomb) jackets have thin walls and can balloon or deform under high pressure. Half-pipe serpentines are wound around the tank body with thick welds, so they have high pressure resistance.

items.q: What happens if heat insulation is not applied?
items.a: The energy (heat or cold) in the tank jacket mixes into the air instead of passing only to the product inside. This drives your energy costs to terrible levels and prolongs the process time. Dense rockwool insulation is essential for heating tanks, and polyurethane insulation that prevents sweating is essential for cooling tanks.

items.q: How is the jacket area calculated?
items.a: The jacket area is calculated using thermodynamic engineering formulas based on the amount of product (kg) in the tank, the specific heat of the product, its initial temperature and how long (minutes/hours) it needs to reach the target temperature.

doc.title: Technical Specification
doc.subtitle: DOK-05 PDF Document
doc.desc: Engineering specification containing thermodynamic area calculations, working pressures and insulation thicknesses.

reference.desc: Steam-heated, half-pipe serpentine and rockwool-insulated cooking tank battery in the food industry.

cta.title: Thermal Calculation
cta.desc: Contact us to calculate the required jacket surface area based on your process target time and temperature values.

metadata.title: Fermentation & Bioreactor Systems | Welltech®
metadata.description: Precise pH, oxygen and temperature-controlled, fully sterile (SIP) stainless steel fermentation systems for biotechnology, pharmaceutical and food industries.

hero.title: Fermentation & Bioreactors
hero.desc: Perfect sterilization for microbial cell cultures and enzyme production. Industrial bioprocess systems with precise pH, Dissolved Oxygen (DO2) and temperature control.

technology.title: Precise Bioprocess Control
technology.desc: Sustaining microbial life and achieving the target product yield in fermentation processes depends on millimetric control of environmental conditions.

features.title: Equipment & Engineering Features
items: Sterile Design to ASME BPE Standard

table.title: Capacity Table

metadata.title: Homogenizer Systems | Welltech®
metadata.description: High-speed (high-shear) rotor-stator homogenizer systems for cosmetic, pharmaceutical and food processes.

hero.title: Homogenizer Systems
hero.desc: Perfect particle reduction in liquid-liquid and liquid-solid emulsions. Rotor-stator technology with high shear force for cosmetics, pharmaceuticals and advanced chemistry processes.

technology.title: Rotor & Stator Technology
technology.desc: Ordinary mixers only move the fluid. Homogenizers subject the fluid to enormous mechanical shear force through rotor blades rotating at a very narrow gap (micron level) and stationary stator blades. This way, substances like oil and water that normally don't mix are converted into a perfect emulsion (cream, mayonnaise, lotion, etc.) and particles are micronized to prevent sedimentation.

table.title: Homogenizer Mounting Types
table.note: * Selected based on your facility's piping system, tank design and product rheology (fluidity) properties.

rows.principle: Mounted to tank bottom, product fed by gravity.
Immersed from the top of the tank via elevator or flange.
Draws powdered raw materials from outside using vacuum created.
rows.usage: Carbon black, Milk powder, Pectin dissolving

doc.title: Technical Specification
doc.subtitle: DOK-08 PDF Document
doc.desc: Technical specification containing rotor-stator tolerances, mechanical seal cooling circuit and motor kW calculations.

reference.desc: 22kW bottom-entry homogenizer cream production reactor operating under vacuum for a luxury skincare product facility.

cta.title: Emulsion Solution
cta.desc: Cosmetics, food or chemistry... Share your product recipe with us and we will design the most efficient particle reduction (high-shear) system.

hero.title: Mixing Process Tanks

technology.title: Homogeneous Mixing Technology
technology.desc: The success of a process is measured by how correctly the mixture is homogenized. We design turbine, propeller, anchor or scraper mixer blades based on the viscosity (fluid like water or viscous like honey) and density of your product. Our systems are equipped with geared motors and PLC-controlled speed inverters to provide maximum control in your process.

technology.title: Critical Process Control
technology.desc1: Polymerization, crystallization and aggressive chemical syntheses cannot be performed in standard storage tanks. technology.desc2: The Half-Pipe Serpentine (Half-Pipe Jacket) technology offered as standard on the body provides 40% more resistance to thermal shocks and high steam pressure compared to conventional jackets.

metadata.title: Fully Automatic CIP Systems | Welltech®
metadata.description: PLC-controlled automatic Clean-in-Place (in-place washing) units that guarantee hygiene standards for pharmaceutical, food and chemical facilities.

hero.title: Fully Automatic CIP Systems
hero.desc: Clean-in-Place (in-place washing) units that guarantee your facility's hygiene standards with PLC control and conductivity-based chemical dosing.

technology.title: Traceable Hygiene Assurance
technology.desc: The only way to prevent cross-contamination in food, beverage and pharmaceutical production lines is validatable washing processes. Welltech CIP (Clean-in-Place) systems wash your pipelines and tanks without disassembly using high-turbulence flow (min. 1.5 m/s). The conductivity of the returning liquid is measured in real-time, and acid and caustic concentrations are automatically replenished through dosing pumps via PLC. Water and energy savings are maximized.

features.title: System & Automation Features
items: Independent Caustic and Acid Dosing Pumps
Automatic Temperature Control with Heat Exchanger

table.title: CIP Station Models
table.note: * Washing lines can be designed as simultaneous (multi-line) or single-line based on facility needs.
table.imgAlt: Modular Design and CIP P&ID Diagram

items.q: How do you guarantee that the washing liquid reaches sufficient speed?
items.a: Turbulent flow is required for hygiene in pipelines. Thanks to flowmeters integrated into the system, the washing flow rate is maintained at a minimum of 1.5 - 2.0 m/s and monitored via PLC.

items.q: Can chemical solutions be reused?
items.a: Yes, our 3 and 4-tank CIP systems have recovery cycles. Returning acid and caustic solutions are analyzed by conductivity sensors; if the concentration drops, they are dosed and returned to the tank. This saves significant amounts of chemicals and water.

items.q: Is reporting and validation possible?
items.a: All CIP operations are recorded in the automation panel along with time, temperature, conductivity and flow data. For audits, these data can be output in PDF format via USB or network to ensure full traceability.

doc.title: Technical Document
doc.subtitle: DOK-16 PDF Specification
doc.desc: CIP system flow diagrams, heat exchanger capacities and pneumatic valve matrix technical details.

reference.desc: Fully automatic 4-tank CIP recovery system running 3 simultaneous lines (multi-line) for an integrated facility processing 200 tons of milk per day.

cta.title: Project Engineering
cta.desc: Contact us to determine the most suitable CIP module for your facility's capacity and washing line lengths.

metadata.title: Self-Priming Hygienic Pumps | Welltech®
metadata.description: Liquid-ring self-priming pump technology for transferring air-gas mixed liquids, foamy products and CIP return lines.

hero.title: Self-Priming Pumps
hero.desc: Even when there is air in the suction line, this technology creates vacuum for uninterrupted flow. The indispensable liquid-ring transfer technology for CIP return lines and foamy liquids.

technology.title: Power in Air-Liquid Mixtures
technology.desc: Standard centrifugal pumps suffer cavitation when air pockets form in the pipeline or at the tank bottom, stopping the transfer. Our self-priming (side-channel/liquid-ring) pumps create a vacuum by mixing the liquid inside with air through a special star impeller design. This technology, which can draw suction even when there is air in the line, is especially used when drawing product from tanks to trucks, with foamy products like whey, and in CIP washing liquid return (CIP Return).

features.title: Technical Equipment & Capacity
items: Up to 8 Meters Deep Suction Capacity
AISI 316L Precision Cast Open Star Impeller

table.title: Performance & Selection Table
table.note: * The pump body must contain some liquid (priming liquid) for the pump to self-prime. Values are determined by our hydraulic engineers for 1 cP viscosity.

items.q: Why can't a centrifugal pump be used as a CIP Return pump?
items.a: During CIP, the chemical liquid returning from the tank contains a large amount of air and foam. The centrifugal pump stops flow when it sees air and the washing line gets blocked. The self-priming pump can swallow the liquid-air mixture and pump it into the system.

items.q: Why do we need to put liquid inside during initial start (Priming)?
items.a: For the liquid ring to form in the pump body and to vacuum out the air inside, part of the body must be filled with liquid from the start.

items.q: Can I draw milk from a truck or underground tank?
items.a: Absolutely. Even if the suction pipe is 7-8 meters underground, the pump creates vacuum and draws the liquid up and pumps it to the main tanks.

doc.title: Technical Document
doc.subtitle: DOK-11 PDF Specification
doc.desc: Vacuum/suction depth charts, liquid-ring impeller tolerances and mechanical connection dimensions.

reference.desc: 30 m³/h capacity CIP return pumps integrated into foamy acid and caustic return lines for a large-scale juice facility.

cta.title: Vacuum Calculation
cta.desc: Tell us your suction depth (negative elevation) and air ratio in the pipeline, and we will design a system that transports your product without cavitation.

metadata.title: Air-Operated Diaphragm Pumps | Welltech®
metadata.description: Pneumatic air-operated diaphragm pump technologies that carry no electrical spark risk for flammable (ATEX) environments and aggressive chemicals.

hero.title: Air-Operated Diaphragm Pumps
hero.desc: Zero electrical spark, full ATEX compliance. Pneumatic systems powered by compressed air providing unrivalled safety in transferring flammable and aggressive chemicals.

safety.title: 100% Safety Without Electricity
safety.desc: In environments with solvent, alcohol or flammable gas emissions, even a tiny spark from an electric motor pump can cause disaster. Pneumatic Diaphragm pumps draw their energy from compressed air from the factory compressor. Since there is no electrical connection, they provide 100% Ex-Proof (ATEX) protection. Since they have no mechanical impeller, they can also easily pump liquids containing fruit particles or solid particles without crushing the product.

features.title: Critical Engineering Features
items: Solid Particle and Viscous Material Transfer
Easy Flow Rate Adjustment with Air Pressure

table.title: Diaphragm Pump Capacity Table
table.note: * The performance of pneumatic pumps is directly dependent on the air pressure (Bar) produced by the compressor in your facility. Data is calculated with reference to 7 Bar air supply.

items.q: Does dry running damage the pump?
items.a: No. Unlike centrifugal and lobe pumps, air diaphragm pumps do not heat up and break down even if they run dry (without liquid) for hours since there is no mechanical friction.

items.q: How can I adjust the flow rate?
items.a: While expensive inverters (frequency drives) are needed for electric motor pumps, simply throttling or opening the air valve from the compressor is sufficient to change the flow rate in diaphragm pumps.

items.q: How do we select the diaphragm material?
items.a: PTFE (Teflon) with excellent chemical resistance for aggressive acids and solvents; Santoprene or NBR with flexible structure for food applications or sludgy products containing abrasive particles.

doc.title: Technical Document
doc.subtitle: DOK-13 PDF Specification
doc.desc: ATEX certification documents, diaphragm chemical resistance table and pressure/air consumption curves.

reference.desc: ATEX transfer station with PTFE diaphragm from reactors to 50-ton storage tanks in a high-flammability chemical production facility.

cta.title: Pneumatic Engineering
cta.desc: Specify your facility compressor capacity and the liquid to be transferred, and we will calculate the correct diaphragm material and size.

metadata.title: Monopumps (Eccentric Screw) | Welltech®
metadata.description: Rotor-stator monopump systems providing pulsation-free and continuous transfer for high-viscosity, sludge, honey and abrasive particle-containing fluids.

hero.title: Monopumps
hero.desc: Designed for the most difficult fluids. With eccentric screw (Rotor-Stator) operating principle, zero vibration and continuous flow for high-viscosity, abrasive and solid particle-containing products.

technology.title: Pulsation-Free and Continuous Transfer
technology.desc: Monopumps (Eccentric Screw Pumps) work on the principle of a helical stainless steel rotor rotating inside an elastomeric (rubber) stator. This unique geometry creates continuously closed cavities in the liquid, pushing the fluid forward under pressure. From water-like fluids to products with viscosity up to 1,000,000 cP such as dough, honey, wastewater sludge, fruit puree, glue and resin, it provides a perfect and constant flow rate without any pulsation.

features.title: Superior Mechanical Properties
items: NBR, EPDM, FKM, PTFE Stator Options
Non-Crushing Flow for Fruit and Food Cells

table.title: Monopump Capacity Table
table.note: * Values are calculated for average viscosity fluids (up to 12 Bar max pressure). Flow varies depending on reducer speed.

items.q: Can monopumps run dry?
items.a: No. Since the stator is usually made of elastomeric (rubber etc.) material, when no fluid (lubricant) passes through it, the stainless rotor rubs against the stator causing excessive heat and burns the stator. The system must be equipped with dry-run protection sensors.

items.q: Can it pump solid particle or seed-containing products?
items.a: Absolutely. This is the greatest strength of monopumps. Products containing particles and fibers like wastewater sludge, seeded fruit purees or olive paste are transferred without clogging and without crushing their structure thanks to the rotor/stator cavity geometry.

items.q: How do we select the stator material?
items.a: According to the chemical composition and temperature of your fluid. For food products like milk and honey: FDA-compliant white NBR or EPDM; for abrasive aggressive acids and chemicals: FKM (Viton) or PTFE (Teflon) stator.

doc.title: Technical Document
doc.subtitle: DOK-11 PDF Specification
doc.desc: Monopump reducer speed ratios, stator chemical resistance table and pressure/flow measurement curves.

reference.desc: Heavy-duty monopump battery with FKM stator, resistant to 12 Bar pressure for transferring 20% density active sludge in wastewater treatment facility.

cta.title: Monopump Selection
cta.desc: Specify your fluid viscosity (cP) and particle density, and we will determine the most suitable rotor-stator pair.
